description: Zapier integration with Salesforce stopped syncing orders after Jan update. 3000 orders stuck.

description: Overcharged by $4200 on December invoice. CFO escalated directly.

description: Need bulk export functionality for case files. Currently exporting one at a time.

description: SSO login broken for entire team of 40 after IT changed their Azure AD tenant ID.

description: Dashboard loading extremely slowly - 45 seconds to load. Was fine last week.

description: Missed 1-hour response SLA on 3 consecutive Critical tickets this month. Penalty clause active.

description: User locked out after 5 failed login attempts. Needs account unlock.
